name: Brown Rice and Black Beans Mardi
recipeIngredient: 2 15-oz cans cooked black beans or pinto beans, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to instructions on the box and set aside.
2. In a large frying pan, sauté onion, garlic, and green pepper in margarine until softened.
3. Add rice, beans, cumin, and salsa to the pan. Stir well.
4. Simmer for about 20 minutes or until all ingredients are heated through and combined.
